title: Server Store Dry Confirm
findings: []。已读取 ISS-20260609-001..067，并按 server/store/doctor/review/recall/events/metrics 范围用 rg 扫描。命中项均归入既有根因：store-only/doctor drift、write-target 重解析、pending layer flip Windows 判断、related/redirect、scope lint、search include_rejected、store symlink、metrics 全局窗口等；未确认完全不同的新 root cause。
